ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the data */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Indicator if the day is a holiday */,
  "weekday" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature recorded in Celsius */,
  "feeling_temp" REAL /* Perceived temperature experienced by individuals */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level as a percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded in km/h */,
  "heavy_rain" INTEGER /* Indicator for heavy rain presence */,
  "light_snow" INTEGER /* Indicator for light snow presence */,
  "mist" INTEGER /* Indicator for mist presence */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the weather record */,
  "precipitation_amount" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index for the day */,
  "sunrise" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  "sunset" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike usage record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the bike usage data */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the bike usage data */,
  "casual_rides" INTEGER /* Number of casual bike rides */,
  "registered_rides" INTEGER /* Number of registered bike rides */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the bike usage record */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the bike usage record */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides */,
  "average_ride_duration" REAL /* Average duration of rides in minutes */,
  "average_ride_distance" REAL /* Average distance of rides in kilometers */,
  "peak_hour" INTEGER /* Hour with the highest number of rides */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "is_public_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicator if the holiday is a public holiday */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., national, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "number_of_days" INTEGER /* Number of days in the month */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekdays" (
  "weekday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekday */,
  "weekday_name" TEXT /* Name of the weekday */,
  "is_weekend" INTEGER /* Indicator if the day is a weekend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weekday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_weather" (
  "uw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association record */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing bike usage */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing weather data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the association */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_weather_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_weather_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES bike_usage ("usage_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each weather record
Indicator if the day is a holiday
Unique identifier for each bike usage record
Year of the bike usage data
Month of the bike usage data
Date of the bike usage record
Hour of the bike usage record
Average duration of rides in minutes
Average distance of rides in kilometers
Hour with the highest number of rides
Indicator if the holiday is a public holiday
Number of days in the month
Indicator if the day is a weekend
Unique identifier for each association record
